name: ganko-vscode
description: Static analysis for Solid.js and CSS

untrustedWorkspaces.description: Solid LSP executes code analysis that requires workspace trust.

solid.exclude.description: Glob patterns to exclude from analysis (e.g. ["backend/**", "scripts/**"]). Matched relative to workspace root.

solid.enableTypeScriptDiagnostics.description: Push TypeScript diagnostics alongside ganko diagnostics. Disable VS Code's built-in TypeScript extension to avoid duplicates.

solid.logLevel.description: Log level for the Solid language server. Messages below this severity are suppressed.
enumDescriptions: Show all messages including finest-grained trace output

solid.trace.server.description: Traces the communication between VS Code and the Solid language server

solid.accessibilityPolicy.description: Accessibility policy template for CSS and JSX style linting. Controls minimum font sizes, touch targets, spacing, and contrast thresholds.
enumDescriptions: WCAG 2.2 Level AA — legal compliance baseline (24px touch targets, 4.5:1 contrast, 16px body text)
WCAG 2.2 Level AAA — enhanced accessibility (44px touch targets, 7:1 contrast)
Touch-optimized mobile — Apple HIG + Material Design 3 (48px touch targets, 16px button text)
Data-dense desktop — dashboards, admin panels, IDEs (13px body text, 24px touch targets)
Low vision / elderly — exceeds AAA (24px body text, 48px touch targets, 10:1 contrast)

solid.eslintConfig.enable.description: Read rule configuration from eslint.config.{mjs,js,cjs} file in workspace root

solid.eslintConfig.path.description: Custom path to ESLint config file (relative to workspace root). If not set, uses auto-discovery.

solid.lsp.env.description: Environment variables to pass to the LSP server process

solid.rules.avoid-conditional-spreads.markdownDescription:
Disallow conditional spread operators that create empty objects. Patterns like `...(condition ? {...} : {})` are fragile and create unnecessary object creations.

Default severity: `error`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.avoid-non-null-assertions.markdownDescription:
Disallow non-null assertion operator (`!`). Use optional chaining, nullish coalescing, or proper type narrowing instead. *(fixable)*

Default severity: `error`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.avoid-object-assign.markdownDescription:
Disallow Object.assign(). Prefer object spread syntax or structuredClone() for copying objects. *(fixable)*

Default severity: `error`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.avoid-object-spread.markdownDescription:
Disallow object spread operators that break Solid's fine-grained reactivity. *(fixable)*

Default severity: `error`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.avoid-type-casting.markdownDescription:
Disallow type casting methods that bypass TypeScript's type safety. Includes unnecessary casts, double assertions, casting to any, type predicates, and unsafe generic assertions. *(fixable)*

Default severity: `error`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.avoid-unsafe-type-annotation.markdownDescription:
Disallow `any` and `unknown` in value-level type annotation positions (parameters, returns, variables, properties)

Default severity: `error`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.event-handlers.markdownDescription:
Enforce naming DOM element event handlers consistently and prevent Solid's analysis from misunderstanding whether a prop should be an event handler. *(fixable)*

Default severity: `error`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.missing-jsdoc-comments.markdownDescription:
Require JSDoc comments on functions with appropriate tags for parameters, return values, and throws.

Default severity: `error`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.no-ai-slop-comments.markdownDescription:
Disallow comments containing specified forbidden words or phrases. Useful for enforcing comment style guidelines and detecting AI-generated boilerplate. *(fixable)*

Default severity: `error`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.no-array-handlers.markdownDescription:
Disallow array handlers in JSX event properties.

Default severity: `error`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.no-banner-comments.markdownDescription:
Disallow banner-style comments with repeated separator characters. *(fixable)*

Default severity: `error`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.no-destructure.markdownDescription:
Disallow destructuring props in Solid components. Props must be accessed via property access (props.x) to preserve reactivity.

Default severity: `error`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.no-inline-imports.markdownDescription:
Disallow inline type imports. Import types at the top of the file for clarity and maintainability.

Default severity: `error`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.string-concat-in-loop.markdownDescription:
Disallow string concatenation with += inside loops. Use array.push() and .join() instead.

Default severity: `error`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.css-no-outline-none-without-.markdownDescription:
Disallow removing outline without explicit focus-visible replacement.

Default severity: `error`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.css-policy-contrast.markdownDescription:
Enforce minimum contrast ratio between foreground and background colors per accessibility policy.

Default severity: `warn`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.css-policy-spacing.markdownDescription:
Enforce minimum letter-spacing, word-spacing, and paragraph spacing per accessibility policy.

Default severity: `warn`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.css-policy-touch-target.markdownDescription:
Enforce minimum interactive element sizes per accessibility policy.

Default severity: `warn`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.css-policy-typography.markdownDescription:
Enforce minimum font sizes and line heights per accessibility policy.

Default severity: `warn`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.css-require-reduced-motion-o.markdownDescription:
Require reduced-motion override for animated selectors.

Default severity: `warn`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.css-no-discrete-transition.markdownDescription:
Disallow transitions on discrete CSS properties.

Default severity: `error`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.css-no-empty-keyframes.markdownDescription:
Disallow empty @keyframes rules.

Default severity: `error`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.no-layout-property-animation.markdownDescription:
Disallow animating layout-affecting properties.

Default severity: `warn`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.no-transition-all.markdownDescription:
Disallow transition: all and transition-property: all.

Default severity: `warn`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.no-unknown-animation-name.markdownDescription:
Disallow animation names that do not match declared keyframes.

Default severity: `error`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.no-unused-keyframes.markdownDescription:
Disallow unused @keyframes declarations.

Default severity: `warn`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.declaration-no-overridden-wi.markdownDescription:
Disallow duplicate declarations of the same property within a single rule block.

Default severity: `warn`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.media-query-overlap-conflict.markdownDescription:
Disallow conflicting declarations in partially overlapping media queries.

Default severity: `warn`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.no-descending-specificity-co.markdownDescription:
Disallow lower-specificity selectors after higher-specificity selectors for the same property.

Default severity: `warn`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.no-layer-order-inversion.markdownDescription:
Disallow source-order assumptions that are inverted by layer precedence.

Default severity: `warn`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.no-redundant-override-pairs.markdownDescription:
Disallow declarations that are deterministically overridden in the same selector context.

Default severity: `warn`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.css-no-unreferenced-componen.markdownDescription:
Detect CSS classes that are never referenced by static JSX class attributes.

Default severity: `warn`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.jsx-classlist-boolean-values.markdownDescription:
Require classList values to be boolean-like expressions.

Default severity: `error`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.jsx-classlist-no-accessor-re.markdownDescription:
Disallow passing accessor references directly as classList values.

Default severity: `error`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.jsx-classlist-no-constant-li.markdownDescription:
Disallow classList entries with constant true/false values.

Default severity: `warn`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.jsx-classlist-static-keys.markdownDescription:
Require classList keys to be static and non-computed.

Default severity: `error`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.jsx-layout-classlist-geometr.markdownDescription:
Flag classList-driven class toggles that map to layout-affecting CSS geometry changes.

Default severity: `warn`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.jsx-layout-fill-image-parent.markdownDescription:
Require stable parent size and positioning for fill-image component usage.

Default severity: `warn`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.jsx-layout-picture-source-ra.markdownDescription:
Require consistent intrinsic aspect ratios across <picture> sources and fallback image.

Default severity: `warn`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.jsx-layout-unstable-style-to.markdownDescription:
Flag dynamic inline style values on layout-sensitive properties that can trigger CLS.

Default severity: `warn`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.jsx-no-duplicate-class-token.markdownDescription:
Disallow duplicate class tokens between class and classList on the same JSX element.

Default severity: `warn`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.jsx-no-undefined-css-class.markdownDescription:
Detect undefined CSS class names in JSX

Default severity: `error`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.jsx-style-kebab-case-keys.markdownDescription:
Require kebab-case keys in JSX style object literals.

Default severity: `error`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.jsx-style-no-function-values.markdownDescription:
Disallow function values in JSX style objects.

Default severity: `error`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.jsx-style-no-unused-custom-p.markdownDescription:
Detect inline style custom properties that are never consumed by CSS var() references.

Default severity: `warn`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.jsx-style-policy.markdownDescription:
Enforce accessibility policy thresholds on inline JSX style objects.

Default severity: `warn`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.css-layout-animation-layout-.markdownDescription:
Disallow keyframe animations that mutate layout-affecting properties and can trigger CLS.

Default severity: `warn`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.css-layout-box-sizing-toggle.markdownDescription:
Disallow conditional box-sizing mode toggles when box chrome contributes to geometry shifts.

Default severity: `warn`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.css-layout-conditional-displ.markdownDescription:
Disallow conditional display collapse in flow without reserved geometry.

Default severity: `warn`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.css-layout-conditional-offse.markdownDescription:
Disallow conditional non-zero block-axis offsets that can trigger layout shifts.

Default severity: `warn`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.css-layout-conditional-white.markdownDescription:
Disallow conditional white-space wrapping mode toggles that can trigger CLS.

Default severity: `warn`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.css-layout-content-visibilit.markdownDescription:
Require intrinsic size reservation when using content-visibility auto to avoid late layout shifts.

Default severity: `warn`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.css-layout-dynamic-slot-no-r.markdownDescription:
Require reserved block space for dynamic content containers to avoid layout shifts.

Default severity: `warn`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.css-layout-font-swap-instabi.markdownDescription:
Require metric overrides for swapping webfonts to reduce layout shifts during font load.

Default severity: `warn`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.css-layout-overflow-anchor-i.markdownDescription:
Disallow overflow-anchor none on dynamic or scrollable containers prone to visible layout shifts.

Default severity: `warn`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.css-layout-overflow-mode-tog.markdownDescription:
Disallow conditional overflow mode switches that can introduce scrollbar-induced layout shifts.

Default severity: `warn`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.css-layout-scrollbar-gutter-.markdownDescription:
Require stable scrollbar gutters for scrollable containers to reduce layout shifts.

Default severity: `warn`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.css-layout-sibling-alignment.markdownDescription:
Detect vertical alignment outliers between sibling elements in shared layout containers.

Default severity: `warn`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.css-layout-stateful-box-mode.markdownDescription:
Disallow stateful selector changes that alter element geometry and trigger layout shifts.

Default severity: `warn`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.css-layout-transition-layout.markdownDescription:
Disallow transitions that animate layout-affecting geometry properties.

Default severity: `warn`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.css-layout-unsized-replaced-.markdownDescription:
Require stable reserved geometry for replaced media elements to prevent layout shifts.

Default severity: `warn`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.css-no-custom-property-cycle.markdownDescription:
Disallow cycles in custom property references.

Default severity: `error`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.css-no-hardcoded-z-index.markdownDescription:
Disallow hardcoded positive z-index literals.

Default severity: `warn`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.css-no-legacy-vh-100.markdownDescription:
Disallow 100vh in viewport sizing declarations.

Default severity: `warn`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.css-z-index-requires-positio.markdownDescription:
Require positioned context when using z-index.

Default severity: `warn`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.no-important.markdownDescription:
Disallow !important declarations.

Default severity: `warn`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.no-unresolved-custom-propert.markdownDescription:
Disallow unresolved custom property references.

Default severity: `error`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.no-unused-custom-properties.markdownDescription:
Disallow unused CSS custom properties.

Default severity: `warn`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.no-complex-selectors.markdownDescription:
Disallow deep selectors that are expensive to match.

Default severity: `warn`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.no-duplicate-selectors.markdownDescription:
Disallow duplicate selector blocks.

Default severity: `warn`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.no-id-selectors.markdownDescription:
Disallow ID selectors.

Default severity: `warn`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.selector-max-attribute-and-u.markdownDescription:
Disallow selectors with attribute or universal selectors beyond configured limits.

Default severity: `off`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.selector-max-specificity.markdownDescription:
Disallow selectors that exceed a specificity threshold.

Default severity: `warn`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.css-no-empty-rule.markdownDescription:
Disallow empty CSS rules.

Default severity: `warn`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.css-no-unknown-container-nam.markdownDescription:
Disallow unknown named containers in @container queries.

Default severity: `error`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.css-no-unused-container-name.markdownDescription:
Disallow unused named containers.

Default severity: `warn`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.layer-requirement-for-compon.markdownDescription:
Require style rules to be inside @layer when the file defines layers.

Default severity: `warn`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.components-return-once.markdownDescription:
Disallow early returns in components. Solid components only run once, and so conditionals should be inside JSX. *(fixable)*

Default severity: `error`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.jsx-no-duplicate-props.markdownDescription:
Disallow passing the same prop twice in JSX. *(fixable)*

Default severity: `error`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.jsx-no-script-url.markdownDescription:
Disallow javascript: URLs. *(fixable)*

Default severity: `error`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.jsx-no-undef.markdownDescription:
Disallow references to undefined variables in JSX. Handles custom directives.

Default severity: `error`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.jsx-uses-vars.markdownDescription:
Detect imported components and directives that are never used in JSX.

Default severity: `warn`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.no-innerhtml.markdownDescription:
Disallow usage of the innerHTML attribute, which can lead to security vulnerabilities. *(fixable)*

Default severity: `error`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.no-unknown-namespaces.markdownDescription:
Enforce using only Solid-specific namespaced attribute names (i.e. `'on:'` in `<div on:click={...} />`).

Default severity: `error`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.show-truthy-conversion.markdownDescription:
Detect <Show when={expr}> where expr is not explicitly boolean, which may have unexpected truthy/falsy behavior. *(fixable)*

Default severity: `error`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.suspense-boundary-missing.markdownDescription:
Detect missing fallback props on Suspense/ErrorBoundary, and lazy components without Suspense wrapper.

Default severity: `error`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.validate-jsx-nesting.markdownDescription:
Validates that HTML elements are nested according to the HTML5 specification.

Default severity: `error`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.avoid-arguments-object.markdownDescription:
Disallow arguments object (use rest parameters instead).

Default severity: `warn`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.avoid-chained-array-methods.markdownDescription:
Flags chained array methods creating 3+ intermediate arrays, or filter().map() pattern.

Default severity: `warn`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.avoid-defensive-copy-for-sca.markdownDescription:
Disallow defensive array copies passed into scalar statistic calls.

Default severity: `warn`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.avoid-delete-operator.markdownDescription:
Disallow delete operator on objects (causes V8 deoptimization).

Default severity: `warn`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.avoid-function-allocation-in.markdownDescription:
Disallow creating closures inside loops.

Default severity: `warn`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.avoid-hidden-class-transitio.markdownDescription:
Suggest consistent object shapes to avoid V8 hidden class transitions.

Default severity: `warn`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.avoid-intermediate-map-copy.markdownDescription:
Disallow temporary Map allocations that are copied key-for-key into another Map.

Default severity: `warn`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.avoid-megamorphic-property-a.markdownDescription:
Avoid property access on `any` or wide union types to prevent V8 deoptimization.

Default severity: `warn`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.avoid-quadratic-pair-compari.markdownDescription:
Disallow nested for-loops over the same collection creating O(n²) pair comparison.

Default severity: `warn`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.avoid-quadratic-spread.markdownDescription:
Disallow spreading accumulator in reduce callbacks (O(n²) complexity).

Default severity: `error`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.avoid-repeated-indexof-check.markdownDescription:
Disallow 3+ .indexOf() calls on the same array variable in one function.

Default severity: `warn`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.avoid-slice-sort-pattern.markdownDescription:
Disallow .slice().sort() and .slice().reverse() chains. Use .toSorted()/.toReversed().

Default severity: `warn`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.avoid-sparse-arrays.markdownDescription:
Disallow new Array(n) without fill (creates holey array).

Default severity: `warn`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.avoid-spread-sort-map-join-p.markdownDescription:
Disallow [...iterable].sort().map().join() pipelines on hot paths.

Default severity: `warn`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.bounded-worklist-traversal.markdownDescription:
Detect queue/worklist traversals with unbounded growth and no guard.

Default severity: `warn`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.closure-captured-scope.markdownDescription:
Detect closures returned from scopes containing large allocations that may be retained.

Default severity: `warn`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.closure-dom-circular.markdownDescription:
Detect event handler property assignments that create closure-DOM circular references.

Default severity: `warn`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.create-root-dispose.markdownDescription:
Detect createRoot with unused dispose parameter.

solid.rules.detached-dom-reference.markdownDescription:
Detect DOM query results stored in module-scoped variables that may hold detached nodes.

Default severity: `warn`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.effect-outside-root.markdownDescription:
Detect reactive computations created outside a reactive root (no Owner).

Default severity: `error`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.finalization-registry-leak.markdownDescription:
Detect FinalizationRegistry.register() where heldValue references the target.

Default severity: `error`

solid.rules.no-char-array-materializatio.markdownDescription:
Disallow split(""), Array.from(str), or [...str] in parsing loops.

Default severity: `warn`

solid.rules.no-double-pass-delimiter-cou.markdownDescription:
Disallow split-based delimiter counting followed by additional split passes.

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

Disallow full split() materialization inside hot string parsing loops.

Default severity: `warn`

solid.rules.no-heavy-parser-constructor-.markdownDescription:
Disallow constructing heavy parsing helpers inside loops.

Default severity: `warn`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.no-leaked-abort-controller.markdownDescription:
Detect AbortController in effects without abort() in onCleanup.

Default severity: `warn`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.no-leaked-animation-frame.markdownDescription:
Detect requestAnimationFrame in effects without cancelAnimationFrame in onCleanup.

Default severity: `warn`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.no-leaked-event-listener.markdownDescription:
Detect addEventListener in effects without removeEventListener in onCleanup.

Default severity: `warn`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.no-leaked-observer.markdownDescription:
Detect Observer APIs in effects without disconnect() in onCleanup.

Default severity: `warn`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.no-leaked-subscription.markdownDescription:
Detect WebSocket/EventSource/BroadcastChannel in effects without close() in onCleanup.

Default severity: `warn`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.no-leaked-timer.markdownDescription:
Detect setInterval/setTimeout in effects without onCleanup to clear them.

Default severity: `warn`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.no-loop-string-plus-equals.markdownDescription:
Disallow repeated string += accumulation in parsing loops.

Default severity: `warn`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.no-multipass-split-pipeline.markdownDescription:
Disallow multipass split/map/filter pipelines in parsing code.

Default severity: `warn`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.no-per-char-substring-scan.markdownDescription:
Disallow per-character substring/charAt scanning patterns in loops.

Default severity: `warn`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.no-repeated-token-normalizat.markdownDescription:
Disallow repeated trim/lower/upper normalization chains on the same token in one function.

Default severity: `warn`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.no-rescan-indexof-loop.markdownDescription:
Disallow repeated indexOf/includes scans from start in parsing loops.

Default severity: `warn`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.no-rest-slice-loop.markdownDescription:
Disallow repeated self-slice reassignment loops in string parsing code.

Default severity: `warn`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.no-shift-splice-head-consume.markdownDescription:
Disallow shift/splice(0,1) head-consume patterns in loops.

Default severity: `warn`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.no-write-only-index.markdownDescription:
Detect index structures that are written but never queried by key.

Default severity: `warn`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.prefer-charcode-over-regex-t.markdownDescription:
Prefer charCodeAt() range checks over regex .test() for single-character classification.

Default severity: `warn`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.prefer-index-scan-over-strin.markdownDescription:
Prefer index-based string scanning over for-of iteration in ASCII parser code.

Default severity: `warn`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.prefer-lazy-property-access.markdownDescription:
Suggests moving property access after early returns when not used immediately.

Default severity: `warn`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.prefer-map-lookup-over-linea.markdownDescription:
Disallow repeated linear scans over fixed literal collections in hot paths.

Default severity: `warn`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.prefer-map-over-object-dicti.markdownDescription:
Suggest Map for dictionary-like objects with dynamic keys.

Default severity: `warn`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.prefer-precompiled-regex.markdownDescription:
Prefer hoisting regex literals to module-level constants to avoid repeated compilation.

Default severity: `warn`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.prefer-set-has-over-equality.markdownDescription:
Disallow 4+ guard-style equality checks against string literals on the same variable. Use a Set.

Default severity: `warn`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.prefer-set-lookup-in-loop.markdownDescription:
Disallow linear search methods (.includes/.indexOf) on arrays inside loops.

Default severity: `warn`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.recursive-timer.markdownDescription:
Detect setTimeout that recursively calls its enclosing function.

Default severity: `warn`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.self-referencing-store.markdownDescription:
Detect setStore() where the value argument references the store itself.

Default severity: `error`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.unbounded-collection.markdownDescription:
Detect module-scoped Map/Set/Array that only grow without removal.

Default severity: `warn`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.unbounded-signal-accumulatio.markdownDescription:
Detect signal setters that accumulate data without truncation via spread+append pattern.

Default severity: `warn`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.async-tracked.markdownDescription:
Disallow async functions in tracked scopes (createEffect, createMemo, etc.)

Default severity: `error`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.children-helper-misuse.markdownDescription:
Detect misuse of the children() helper that causes unnecessary re-computation or breaks reactivity

Default severity: `error`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.cleanup-scope.markdownDescription:
Detect onCleanup called outside of a valid reactive scope

Default severity: `error`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.derived-signal.markdownDescription:
Detect functions that capture reactive values but are called in untracked contexts

Default severity: `error`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.effect-as-memo.markdownDescription:
Detect createEffect that only sets a derived signal value, which should be createMemo instead *(fixable)*

Default severity: `error`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.effect-as-mount.markdownDescription:
Detect createEffect/createRenderEffect with no reactive dependencies that should be onMount instead *(fixable)*

Default severity: `error`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.inline-component.markdownDescription:
Detect component functions defined inside other components, which causes remount on every parent update

Default severity: `error`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.no-top-level-signal-call.markdownDescription:
Disallow calling signals at component top-level (captures stale snapshots)

Default severity: `error`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.ref-early-access.markdownDescription:
Detect accessing refs before they are assigned (before mount)

Default severity: `error`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.resource-access-unchecked.markdownDescription:
Detect accessing resource data without checking loading/error state.

Default severity: `error`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.resource-refetch-loop.markdownDescription:
Detect refetch() calls inside createEffect which can cause infinite loops

Default severity: `error`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.signal-call.markdownDescription:
Require signals to be called as functions when used in tracked contexts *(fixable)*

Default severity: `error`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.signal-in-loop.markdownDescription:
Detect problematic signal usage inside For/Index loop callbacks

Default severity: `error`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.store-reactive-break.markdownDescription:
Detect patterns that break store reactivity: spreading stores, top-level property extraction, or destructuring

Default severity: `error`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.transition-pending-unchecked.markdownDescription:
Detect useTransition usage without handling the isPending state

Default severity: `error`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.batch-optimization.markdownDescription:
Suggest using batch() when multiple signal setters are called in the same synchronous scope *(fixable)*

Default severity: `warn`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.imports.markdownDescription:
Enforce consistent imports from "solid-js", "solid-js/web", and "solid-js/store".

Default severity: `error`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.index-vs-for.markdownDescription:
Suggest <For> for object arrays and <Index> for primitive arrays. *(fixable)*

Default severity: `warn`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.no-react-deps.markdownDescription:
Disallow usage of dependency arrays in `createEffect`, `createMemo`, and `createRenderEffect`. *(fixable)*

Default severity: `error`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.no-react-specific-props.markdownDescription:
Disallow usage of React-specific `className`/`htmlFor` props, which were deprecated in v1.4.0. *(fixable)*

Default severity: `error`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.prefer-for.markdownDescription:
Enforce using Solid's `<For />` component for mapping an array to JSX elements. *(fixable)*

Default severity: `warn`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.prefer-memo-complex-styles.markdownDescription:
Enforce extracting complex style computations to createMemo for better approach. Complex inline style objects are rebuilt on every render, which can impact approach.

Default severity: `warn`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.prefer-show.markdownDescription:
Enforce using Solid's `<Show />` component for conditionally showing content. Solid's compiler covers this case, so it's a stylistic rule only. *(fixable)*

Default severity: `warn`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.self-closing-comp.markdownDescription:
Disallow extra closing tags for components without children. *(fixable)*

Default severity: `warn`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

solid.rules.style-prop.markdownDescription:
Require CSS properties in the `style` prop to be valid and kebab-cased (ex. 'font-size'), not camel-cased (ex. 'fontSize') like in React, and that property values with dimensions are strings, not numbers with implicit 'px' units. *(fixable)*

Default severity: `warn`

*Editor-only override. For CLI/CI, configure in `eslint.config.mjs`.*

semanticTokenTypes.description: A Solid.js accessor (createDeferred, createSelector, children, from)
A Solid.js computation primitive (createEffect, createMemo, etc.)

semanticTokenModifiers.description: Indicates a tracked access (signal read creates a dependency)
Indicates a declaration site for a reactive construct

scripts.clean: bun -e "import { rm } from 'node:fs/promises'; await Promise.all(['dist', 'node_modules'].map((p) => rm(p, { recursive: true, force: true })));"
scripts.package: bun run generate && vsce package --no-dependencies && code-insiders --install-extension ganko-vscode-$(node -p "require('./package.json').version").vsix --force
